problem.question: What concrete experimental question are we trying to answer?
successDefinition: Produce a concise, testable idea with a crisp mechanism
Define an evaluation plan that can distinguish signal from noise
Show early evidence that the mechanism is real, necessary, and worth review
Respect the user's background, resources, and explicit requirements
nonGoals: Do not auto-start implementation in src/ before user review
Do not rely on hidden ensembling, metric gaming, or benchmark leakage
Do not settle for a narrow tweak with weak upside or unclear evaluation

rules: Do not auto-start implementation before the user review gate is reached and unlocked by a human
Do not start autonomous research until the user has provided research background and requirements
Every exploration run must save commands, configs, logs, results, and interpretation
idea.md must be revised whenever evidence changes the best current version of the idea
The loop must stop once the idea is professionalized and ready for user review

automation.notes: Post-review implementation and benchmark tuning are intentionally outside the autonomous loop. final_review may reopen earlier autonomous stages before user_review.

principles: One item should test one mechanism
Negative evidence should kill weak ideas
hardRules: If the mechanism cannot be explained crisply in 1-2 sentences, reject or simplify it
If the evaluation setup cannot distinguish real signal from noise, simplify or redesign it
If the novelty is only a narrow follow-up tweak without a qualitatively new mechanism, reject it
If the idea would not clear an honest review bar under the user's constraints, sharpen it or kill it

userStories.title: Lock the exact research question and win condition
userStories.hypothesis: A sharper problem framing prevents the loop from wandering into metric gaming or low-upside novelty.
constraints: The question must be explicit and falsifiable
Success conditions must be implementation-free at this stage
acceptanceCriteria: Write the exact question, non-goals, and win condition
Record the research box and key constraints clearly
Remove ambiguity about what counts as success versus noise

userStories.title: Map the evaluation landscape and likely bottlenecks
userStories.hypothesis: A careful evaluation framing will expose a narrow gap worth targeting before method design begins.
constraints: Do not commit to a final method yet
Must identify evaluation gotchas and systems constraints that actually matter
acceptanceCriteria: Summarize baseline strengths and weaknesses
Document likely failure slices or bottleneck clusters
Record evaluation rules that would invalidate a fake win

userStories.title: Study the most relevant prior work deeply
userStories.hypothesis: A targeted literature review will separate real mechanism gaps from cosmetic novelty opportunities.
constraints: Focus on the strongest relevant methods only
Explain why each method may fail under this evaluation setup
acceptanceCriteria: Document the strongest relevant prior methods
Summarize each method's mechanism and limitation
Identify at least one concrete gap worth testing

userStories.title: Write the first full idea.md
userStories.hypothesis: A strong initial idea can be stated before heavy experimentation if the problem and gap are sharp enough.
constraints: The idea must be concise, elegant, and mechanistically crisp
The idea must have a clean evaluation path under the available setup
The idea must not merely be a narrow follow-up patch
acceptanceCriteria: State the mechanism in 1-2 sentences
Explain the novelty, evaluation fit, falsification path, and review-level claim honestly
List the smallest decisive experiments

userStories.title: Design the decisive early-exploration plan
userStories.hypothesis: A minimal but decisive validation plan can determine whether the idea deserves to survive.
constraints: Plan the smallest set of decisive tests, not an unfocused sweep
Explicitly define kill criteria and stop conditions
acceptanceCriteria: Write the experiment plan, required artifacts, and decision thresholds
Define what can be parallelized and what must remain sequential
Record what evidence would kill, revise, or promote the idea

userStories.title: Execute the early-exploration plan
userStories.hypothesis: Small, decisive experiments can show whether the mechanism is real, necessary, and worth continued belief.
constraints: All commands, configs, logs, and interpretations must be saved
Problems discovered during exploration must trigger explicit reasoning and refinement
acceptanceCriteria: Run the planned decisive experiments
Save raw evidence and a readable summary under the exploration root
Update idea.md as evidence sharpens or weakens the mechanism

userStories.title: Stop exploration and professionalize the final idea
userStories.hypothesis: Once the major unknowns are resolved, the best contribution is to converge the idea cleanly instead of continuing to explore.
constraints: Stop once the core unknowns are resolved or the idea is invalidated
Prepare a reviewer-ready idea without making the final handoff decision yet
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite idea.md into a clean final version
Separate supported claims from remaining risks honestly
Leave final_review with a clean input package to judge

userStories.title: Run the final AI review and decide handoff versus rework
userStories.hypothesis: A final adversarial review should decide whether the current evidence deserves human review or another autonomous research cycle.
constraints: Write the structured review panel before finalizing the memo
If autonomous rework is chosen, specify reopenStage and concrete reworkGoals
A positive handoff must clear both an algorithmic modernity bar and a credible large-scale GPU execution bar
acceptanceCriteria: Fill the review panel with a structured conclusion
Write a final review memo consistent with the panel
Choose handoff_to_user or autonomous_rework honestly
Explicitly judge whether the algorithm is modern enough and whether it can scale credibly to large GPU workloads

userStories.title: Stop at the user review gate
userStories.hypothesis: A human review gate after final_review prevents autonomous drift into implementation without approval.
constraints: Do not auto-advance into implementation
Set automation.state to awaiting_user_review only after final_review says handoff_to_user
acceptanceCriteria: Leave the repository ready for human review
Record the stop condition in the control file
Stop the autonomous loop cleanly

userStories.title: Implementation after explicit human approval
userStories.hypothesis: Only a human should decide whether the idea deserves code-level execution.
constraints: Requires explicit human approval
Out of scope for autonomous execution
acceptanceCriteria: Human approves implementation scope
Implementation plan is explicit

userStories.title: Benchmark tuning after explicit human approval
userStories.hypothesis: Tuning should happen only after the core idea is accepted by a reviewer.
constraints: Requires explicit human approval
Out of scope for autonomous execution
acceptanceCriteria: Human approves tuning scope
Tuning goals are explicit
